name: fred-mood-shift
description: Awkward pause / mood-shift / 'but/however/oops' language. Fred (soundfx) should appear in the chain most of the time — his patterns are broad and his job is reacting to moments.

input.transcript: Wait, hold on — actually, that company crashed and burned. They shut down last month. Wow, that's insane. But however unfortunately, um, the whole team got laid off. Whoops. The launch was supposed to be a new paradigm but it failed, and the founders admit they were wrong about the market.
